title: Sealing sleeve for protection of components in a hearing device
abstract: Described is a hearing device, wherein the engine module is enfolded in an elastic sealing sleeve. The sealing sleeve is configured to fit tightly on the engine module and comprises a sleeve opening configured for allowing the engine module to pass through during assembly or disassembly of the hearing device, and a rigid housing shell covers at least part of the elastic sealing sleeve.
claims: 1. A hearing device comprising: a rigid frame; a plurality of electronic components being held in place at least partly by the rigid frame; an elastic sealing sleeve configured to fit around the rigid frame, the sealing sleeve comprising a sleeve opening configured for allowing the rigid frame to pass through during assembly or disassembly of the hearing device, wherein the elastic sealing sleeve is configured to surround the electronic components and a majority of the rigid frame; wherein the hearing device further comprises a rigid housing shell covering at least a part of the elastic sealing sleeve, and wherein the elastic sealing sleeve is more elastic than the rigid housing shell that covers the at least the part of the elastic sealing sleeve; and wherein the elastic sealing sleeve is configured for placement between the rigid frame and the rigid housing.
